## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Affected areas

- [ ] Web app
- [ ] Signaling server
- [ ] Protocol
- [ ] Crypto
- [ ] Storage/resume
- [ ] TURN/networking
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Tooling

## Files/folders touched

List the important files or folders changed.

## Testing

Describe how this was tested.

## Security/privacy impact

Answer clearly:

- Does this change affect encryption, keys, nonces, or authenticated metadata?
- Does this change affect what the server can see?
- Does this change affect resume/checkpoint behavior?
- Does this change add logging or telemetry?

## Protocol compatibility

- [ ] No protocol changes
- [ ] Protocol changes are backward-compatible
- [ ] Protocol changes are breaking and documented

## Checklist

- [ ] I updated relevant docs.
- [ ] I avoided logging secrets or URL fragments.
- [ ] I considered failure states.
- [ ] I added or updated tests where appropriate.
